# Guardian AI

> An AI-powered parental dashboard that helps families build healthier digital habits — warm, supportive, and never about surveillance.

Guardian AI gives parents weekly wellness reports, shared screen-time agreements, and gentle conversation starters so families can talk about technology together. It is built for parents and guardians of children and teens.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and what Guardian AI is about.
- [About](/about): Who Guardian AI is for and how to get in touch.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): What data is collected, how it is stored, and how to request deletion.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): The simple terms for using Guardian AI.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account.
